_comment: Single source of truth for every image on the site: file path, page(s), alt (EN), caption, keywords. All alts are applied from this file at runtime (assets/js/media.js) and audited at /admin/media/. Files not yet on disk render as tasteful placeholders. TODO: replace placeholder files with Estelle's real photography.
